title: Monitor and control irrigation drainage systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor and control irrigation drainage systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess irrigation drainage and collection systems

pcs.text: Measure drainage performance according to current industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure drainage performance according to current industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure drainage performance according to current industry standards.

pcs.text: Measure drainage and tail water quality according to current industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure drainage and tail water quality according to current industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure drainage and tail water quality according to current industry standards.

pcs.text: Measure water table depth where required according to current industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure water table depth where required according to current industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure water table depth where required according to current industry standards.

pcs.text: Measure soil salinity where required according to current industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure soil salinity where required according to current industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure soil salinity where required according to current industry standards.

pcs.text: Record results according to current industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record results according to current industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record results according to current industry standards.

pcs.text: Identify and record factors external to the system which may cause interference
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record factors external to the system which may cause interference?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record factors external to the system which may cause interference.

pcs.text: Analyse drainage system data and compare to the performance specified in the irrigation drainage plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse drainage system data and compare to the performance specified in the irrigation drainage plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse drainage system data and compare to the performance specified in the irrigation drainage plan.
